---
name: Feature request
about: A change to an existing tool, or an idea for a new one
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
New tool? Read the "Adding a new tool" flow in CONTRIBUTING.md first — new tools
start as an issue proposing the name, purpose, and input/output contract, and
need maintainer sign-off before a PR. Every tool does exactly one thing; scope
creep on an existing tool is usually a new tool instead.
-->

**What's missing or awkward today**

<!-- the concrete friction, ideally with the command you wish worked -->

**Proposed behaviour**

<!-- for an existing tool: the change. For a new tool: name, one-line purpose,
and the input → output contract (what it reads, what it writes to stdout). -->

**Why this fits the suite**

<!-- one thing, composable, pipe-safe, offline-capable. How does it stay in
scope rather than becoming a second tool wearing a flag? -->
